title: UP Board 10th, 12th Result 2026 OUT: Check Your Marksheet Via DigiLocker, UMANG Here
description: UPMSP Board 10th, 12th Result 2026: UP Board 10th and 12th result has been declared for around 52 lakh students today, April 23 at 4 pm. Check download link, ways to download your marksheet here.
